description: Frozen preregistered materials-paper-v2 suite: 50 independent association vignettes and 24 matched focus/suppress/neutral directed-modulation triplets. Generated deterministically by scripts/generate_materials_paper_v2.py.

prompts.title: Dimpled tensile failure 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A tensile coupon developed pronounced necking before separation. Its failure face contained rounded dimples centered on inclusions, with a cup-shaped center and a surrounding slanted lip.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Dimpled tensile failure 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: After substantial plastic elongation, a metal bar separated along a surface filled with microscopic pits around second-phase particles. Neighboring pits had joined into larger depressions.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Dimpled tensile failure 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A pulled specimen narrowed strongly in its gauge section. Electron microscopy of the separated faces showed deep equiaxed dimples around particles and elongated dimples near the outer rim.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Dimpled tensile failure 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: The load-displacement curve showed extensive post-yield deformation before final separation. The mating surfaces displayed many rounded depressions that had linked across the section.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Dimpled tensile failure 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A structural alloy absorbed considerable energy and formed a visible waist before failure. Its cup-and-cone surface was covered by particle-centered microscopic pits.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Interface-localized stainless-steel attack 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: An austenitic stainless component remained near 650 degrees Celsius long enough for chromium-rich carbides to decorate grain interfaces. Chloride exposure then produced connected grooves along those interfaces while the interiors stayed intact.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Interface-localized stainless-steel attack 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A welded stainless plate experienced a prolonged intermediate-temperature dwell. Subsequent acid testing revealed narrow continuous attack paths around each grain and chromium-depleted zones beside carbide particles.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Interface-localized stainless-steel attack 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Metallography of heat-affected stainless steel showed carbide films at crystallite edges. After immersion in an aggressive aqueous solution, material loss followed those edges rather than crossing the grain interiors.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Interface-localized stainless-steel attack 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A stainless tube cooled slowly through the carbide-forming temperature range. Service in chloride brine later produced a network of fissures and grooves tracing the outlines of individual grains.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Interface-localized stainless-steel attack 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Following an intermediate-temperature heat treatment, austenitic steel contained chromium-rich particles at grain interfaces. Chemical exposure preferentially removed narrow regions next to those particles.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Cyclic loading and beach-mark morphology 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A rotating shaft survived many thousands of alternating load cycles before sudden separation. Concentric beach marks spread from a surface notch, and fine parallel ridges covered the smooth region.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Cyclic loading and beach-mark morphology 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A component failed after repeated stress reversals far below its monotonic strength. The separated surface contained a smooth semicircular region advancing from a machining mark and a rough final overload zone.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Cyclic loading and beach-mark morphology 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: An aircraft bracket endured a long sequence of takeoff and landing loads. Microscopy showed evenly spaced ridges marking incremental advance from a bolt-hole corner.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Cyclic loading and beach-mark morphology 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A steel axle broke after millions of modest load cycles. Ratchet marks identified several surface origins, while curved arrest bands recorded successive stages of front advance.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Cyclic loading and beach-mark morphology 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A notched specimen was subjected to a sinusoidal load until separation. Most of the surface was smooth and striated, followed by a small rough region formed during the final overload.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Faceted low-temperature failure 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A body-centered alloy separated at low temperature with negligible necking. The failure face consisted of flat crystallographic facets connected by river-like markings.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Faceted low-temperature failure 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: During impact testing below the transition temperature, a ferritic specimen absorbed little energy. Its separated surface was shiny and faceted, with steps running through individual grains.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Faceted low-temperature failure 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A thick steel plate failed suddenly in cold service without visible plastic distortion. Microscopy revealed flat planes and converging river patterns cutting across grain interiors.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Faceted low-temperature failure 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A low-temperature bend test produced abrupt separation after almost no permanent curvature. The mating faces displayed large flat facets and feather-like markings.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Faceted low-temperature failure 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A notched ferritic bar showed low impact energy and a bright granular-looking failure face. Microscopic steps passed directly through crystallites rather than around their edges.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Slow high-temperature deformation 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A component held for months near half its melting temperature elongated slowly under a constant load well below its room-temperature yield strength. Small rounded holes accumulated at grain interfaces before rupture.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Slow high-temperature deformation 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Under steady tensile load at elevated temperature, a polycrystal first deformed rapidly, then at an almost constant slow rate, and finally accelerated as microscopic holes linked along grain edges.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Slow high-temperature deformation 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A turbine alloy exposed to sustained stress and heat developed time-dependent strain. Late in life, isolated pores at triple junctions enlarged and joined into an interfacial failure path.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Slow high-temperature deformation 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A fine-grained metal changed shape gradually during a long low-stress hold close to its melting point. Atoms moved from compressed interfaces toward tensile ones and the specimen elongated.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Slow high-temperature deformation 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Long-duration testing at high temperature produced a nearly linear strain-versus-time segment followed by rapid extension. Microscopy found linked pores along grain interfaces.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Hard-particle obstacle strengthening 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A metal contains a dense dispersion of hard nonshearable nanoscale particles. Lattice line imperfections curve between neighboring particles and leave loops around them as load increases.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Hard-particle obstacle strengthening 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Heat treatment creates many fine second-phase particles that resist cutting. Moving line defects must arc between the particles, and reducing their spacing raises the required stress.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Hard-particle obstacle strengthening 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Electron microscopy after deformation shows loops encircling rigid particles within a metal matrix. The particles were too hard for moving lattice imperfections to pass through directly.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Hard-particle obstacle strengthening 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: An aged alloy gains yield strength from closely spaced stable particles. Under load, flexible line imperfections bend around each obstacle rather than slicing it.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Hard-particle obstacle strengthening 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A fixed particle volume fraction is refined into a larger number of smaller nonshearable obstacles. The free span available to a moving line imperfection decreases markedly.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Rapid diffusionless steel transformation 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Austenitic steel is cooled so quickly that long-range atomic redistribution cannot occur. A hard needle-like product forms by coordinated lattice motion, and its body-centered cell is elongated along one axis.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Rapid diffusionless steel transformation 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Rapid quenching produces thin laths without allowing carbon to redistribute over long distances. The product lattice is body-centered but has unequal axial dimensions.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Rapid diffusionless steel transformation 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A steel sample transforms almost instantaneously during severe cooling. Atoms move cooperatively over short distances, producing a hard plate-like phase with one stretched unit-cell axis.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Rapid diffusionless steel transformation 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Suppressing atomic redistribution during cooling converts the parent face-centered phase into a hard acicular product. The new body-centered cell has a c-to-a ratio different from one.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Rapid diffusionless steel transformation 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A quenched carbon steel contains packets of fine laths and high internal strain. Formation required a coordinated shape change rather than long-range solute transport.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Crystal line-imperfection motion 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Under resolved loading, a line imperfection moves across a close-packed plane in the direction of its mismatch vector, leaving a permanent offset at the free surface.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Crystal line-imperfection motion 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Plastic strain begins when mobile line imperfections sweep across selected crystallographic planes and create small surface steps.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Crystal line-imperfection motion 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A single crystal deforms by the passage of linear lattice imperfections along densely packed planes. Their motion produces an irreversible relative displacement of the crystal halves.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Crystal line-imperfection motion 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Etch pits tracing mobile line imperfections shift across a crystal during loading. Each passage leaves a step whose direction follows the mismatch vector.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Crystal line-imperfection motion 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Once the resolved driving force exceeds a critical value, a linear lattice defect travels on its favored plane and the specimen acquires permanent deformation.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Resistance to notch-driven failure 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Two alloys have similar yield strength, but one notched specimen absorbs far more energy before unstable separation and tolerates a much larger flaw under the same remote load.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Resistance to notch-driven failure 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A pre-notched plate continues to carry increasing load while a local damaged zone blunts the notch tip. Considerable work is required before rapid extension begins.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Resistance to notch-driven failure 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: An alloy with a sharp starter notch resists sudden extension under increasing tensile load. The critical stress-intensity value measured at instability is unusually high.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Resistance to notch-driven failure 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: During a compact-tension test, substantial energy is dissipated near the notch tip before the specimen separates. The material tolerates larger defects than a comparison alloy.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: Resistance to notch-driven failure 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A structural steel containing a sharp flaw remains stable under loads that cause immediate separation in a less damage-resistant steel. Its critical intensity threshold is larger.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: High-temperature environmental surface layer 1
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A nickel alloy held in hot air develops an adherent multilayer surface film as metal atoms react with oxygen. Continued exposure thickens the film according to an approximately parabolic time law.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: High-temperature environmental surface layer 2
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: During prolonged furnace exposure, a metal component gains mass and forms a dark brittle surface layer rich in oxygen and metal cations.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: High-temperature environmental surface layer 3
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A hot steel coupon exposed to air becomes covered by several ceramic-like surface layers. Growth slows as ions must travel through the existing film.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: High-temperature environmental surface layer 4
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: Elevated-temperature air exposure produces a compact protective film on a chromium-containing alloy. The film limits further oxygen ingress by solid-state transport.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.

prompts.title: High-temperature environmental surface layer 5
prompts.description: Preregistered unnamed materials vignette; compare fixed-band J-lens ranks with the matched logit-lens baseline.
prompts.text: A turbine component operated in oxygen-bearing gas develops a thick external reaction product that can spall during thermal cycling.
prompts.note: Primary association-suite item. Inclusion requires tokenizer-level input/output absence. The family-level endpoint is paired pass@k/AUC for J-lens versus logit lens over the fixed 38--92% band.
